title: polycarena plantaginis
intro: Polycarena plantaginis, also known as the bitter leaf or bitter plant, is a plant species that belongs to the Scrophulariaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, where its bitter compounds stimulate digestion and relieve nausea. The health benefits of Polycarena plantaginis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain types of fever and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Polycarena plantaginis often involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or using the plant as an ingredient in traditional remedies such as infusions or tonics.
